channel.title: energy monitoring on
channel.description: Recent content in energy monitoring on

item.title: Turn ESP32 Into a Smart Energy Meter with Home Assistant Integration
item.description: Turn ESP32 into a WiFi Presence Detector I’ve always been a bit obsessed with data, especially when it comes to understanding my home’s energy consumption. After getting hit with a surprisingly high electricity bill last winter, I decided it was time to stop guessing and start measuring. Commercial smart plugs with energy monitoring are great, but what if you want to monitor a whole circuit, like your kitchen or workshop? That’s when I decided to turn an ESP32 into a smart energy meter.

item.title: Track Your Electricity Consumption with Shelly Pro 2PM: Advantages and Home Assistant Integration
item.description: Track Your Electricity Consumption with Shelly Pro 2PM: Advantages and Home Assistant Integration Ever stared at your electricity bill and wondered, “How did I use that much power?" I certainly have. That’s why I decided to take control by monitoring my home’s energy consumption in real-time using the Shelly Pro 2PM—a versatile, Wi-Fi-enabled energy monitoring device. In this guide, I’ll walk you through setting it up, integrating it with Home Assistant, and turning raw data into actionable insights.
